title: Family Island Hopping Boat Tour
shortDesc: Hop between Samui's nearby islands — crystal water, empty beaches, and snorkeling stops.
description: One of the ultimate Koh Samui experiences — a full-day or half-day boat trip hopping between the stunning nearby islands of Koh Tan, Koh Mudsum, and Koh Mat Sum. Family-friendly tours include shallow snorkeling stops, beach breaks on deserted white sand beaches, and fresh seafood lunch. Guides ensure kids are safe and engaged throughout. A day that will be the highlight of any family holiday.
